name: Data Center Fabric & SDN
description: Cisco ACI, NSX-T, and software-defined networking — fabric health, policy compliance, and endpoint tracking.
quickTip: Install Splunk Add-on for Cisco ACI and connect to APIC for fault, event, and audit data.

subcategories.name: Cisco ACI
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk_TA_cisco-aci (Splunkbase 4022) for APIC syslog, fault, event, audit, and health-score ingest. cisco_dc_networking_app_for_splunk (Splunkbase 7777) for cross-fabric dashboards. SC4S 3.40+ for syslog routing.
subcategories.dataSources: APIC syslog (`cisco:aci:syslog`), fault stream (`cisco:aci:fault`), event stream (`cisco:aci:event`), audit log (`cisco:aci:audit`), health scores (`cisco:aci:health`), contract hits (`cisco:aci:contract`), endpoint table (`cisco:aci:endpoint`), endpoint mobility (`cisco:aci:ep_mobility`), tenant inventory (`cisco:aci:tenant`). REST polling against APIC `/api/node/class/{faultInst,eventRecord,aaaSessionLR,fvCEp,fvIp,fabricNode}` and `/api/node/mo/topology/health.json` for health-score deltas. Lookups `aci_tenant_owner.csv`, `aci_endpoint_pci_scope.csv`, `aci_contract_business_intent.csv`.

subcategories.name: VMware NSX
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk_TA_vmware-nsxt (Splunkbase 4856) for NSX 4.x / NSX-T 3.x DFW, IDFW, transport node, and Edge telemetry. Splunk_TA_vmware (Splunkbase 1810) for vCenter cross-correlation. SC4S 3.40+ for NSX syslog routing.
subcategories.dataSources: NSX Manager syslog (`vmware:nsxt:syslog`), Distributed Firewall logs (`vmware:nsxt:firewall`), Identity Firewall events (`vmware:nsxt:idfw`), DFW policy / sections / rules (`vmware:nsxt:dfw_policy`), DFW security groups (`vmware:nsxt:dfw_groups`), transport-node health (`vmware:nsxt:transport_node`), Edge appliances (`vmware:nsxt:edge`), load balancer telemetry (`vmware:nsxt:lb`). REST polling against NSX Policy API `/policy/api/v1/{infra,domains,services,groups}` for policy inventory and microsegmentation effectiveness analytics. Lookups `nsxt_security_group_owner.csv`, `nsxt_pci_scope.csv`, `nsxt_change_window.csv`.

subcategories.name: Other SDN
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Connect for Kubernetes (Helm 1.5+) for Cilium / Calico CNI flow logs and audit. Splunk OpenTelemetry Collector for gNMI streaming telemetry. Splunk Add-on for Arista (community), Splunk Add-on for Juniper (Splunkbase 2847). Custom HEC for Big Switch BCF, Arista CloudVision Portal (CVP), Juniper Apstra, Aruba CX Fabric Composer, OVS / OVN telemetry.
subcategories.dataSources: Cilium Hubble flow logs (`cilium:hubble:flow`), Cilium agent logs (`cilium:agent:log`), Calico Felix flow logs (`calico:felix:flow`) and Felix system log (`calico:felix:log`), Kubernetes audit (`kube:audit`), OVS flow telemetry (`ovs:flow`), Arista EOS syslog (`arista:eos:syslog`) and CloudVision events (`arista:cvp:event`), Juniper Junos syslog (`juniper:junos:syslog`) and Apstra fabric events (`juniper:apstra:event`), Aruba CX syslog (`aruba:cx:syslog`), gNMI streaming telemetry (`gnmi:telemetry`). Lookups `k8s_namespace_owner.csv`, `cni_policy_intent.csv`, `sdn_fabric_inventory.csv`.

subcategories.name: Cisco Nexus Dashboard & NX-OS Fabric
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk_TA_cisco-nexus (Splunkbase 6876) for Nexus 9K NX-OS / NX-API / NETCONF and Nexus Dashboard Insights (NDI) telemetry. cisco_dc_networking_app_for_splunk (Splunkbase 7777) for fabric-wide dashboards.
subcategories.dataSources: Nexus 9K syslog (`cisco:nexus:syslog`), NX-API JSON-RPC responses (`cisco:nexus:nxapi`), NETCONF policy verification responses (`cisco:nexus:netconf`), Nexus Dashboard Insights anomaly stream (`cisco:ndi:anomaly`), NDI syslog (`cisco:ndi:syslog`), NDI bug / PSIRT advisories (`cisco:ndi:bug`, `cisco:ndi:psirt`), NDFC fabric events (`cisco:ndfc:event`), NDO multi-site audit (`cisco:ndo:audit`). REST polling against NDI `/sedgeapi/v1/anomalies` and NDFC `/appcenter/cisco/ndfc/api/v1/lan-fabric/rest/control`. Lookups `nexus_fabric_inventory.csv`, `evpn_vxlan_segment_owner.csv`.
